title: SanCraft 2
description: SanCraft SMP Custom Modpack Made for the best experience and visuals when playing on SanCraft SMP. Includes shaders and resource packs, plus mods for maps, Simple Voice Chat, and fullscreen support. Use this modpack to align with the mods on SanCraft SMP.
body:
SanCraft SMP Custom Modpack made for the best experience and visuals when playing on SanCraft SMP. Includes shaders and resource packs, plus mods for maps, Simple Voice Chat, and fullscreen support. Use this modpack to align with the mods on SanCraft SMP. Includes a custom resourcepack to see icons for the different teams you can join.

Server IP: available in our Discord — you can also ask questions there. :) Discord: https://discord.gg/HmAtBrGFYX
